process.summary: The team records manual entries in a suspense account while waiting for support documents.

steps.description: Operations sends a posting request to accounting.

evidence.text: Operations sends a posting request to accounting.
Temporary posting until supporting documents arrive.

posting_logic: Debit suspense account and clear after documentation review.

evidence.text: The memorandum does not define a closure deadline.

inconsistencies.title: Suspense account needs rationale
inconsistencies.description: Suspense account lacks clear closure logic and supporting evidence.

evidence.text: manual entries in a suspense account

follow_up_questions.question: What is the deadline and owner for clearing suspense postings?
follow_up_questions.rationale: Suspense accounts require closure logic to reduce unresolved balances.
